textByHashes.72da259ed4ed4f89cf2cde0b7a592597d20c8aea: Today is your lucky day, sirrah! I am donating to the victims of crime to atone for my past actions!
textByHashes.96722772c3621b8ecced851b2ebdaa1a54e1a428: Today is your lucky day, madam! I am donating to the victims of crime to atone for my past actions!
textByHashes.7c1e7817528e4f51e92a5e496f6b13e3ad3c731e: Today is your lucky day, my liege! I am donating to the victims of crime to atone for my past actions!
textByHashes.7b1809422b12e63e850b398a675c2a4ca837c88d: I must leave you now, sirrah!
textByHashes.96f13ec35e86a45748267a2b897ed3e3edc5c852: I must leave you now, ma'am!
textByHashes.39e60fec83fbcbd8276bc7917e981c67c58370eb: I must leave you now, my liege!
textByHashes.4cf34214414a8853ac3eb340ce725adabdf62803: It is someone else with whom I desire to speak, but he seems to be preoccupied.
textByHashes.1f615eb6ccc46fdbc36b6c49199a91d151d1e048: Good day to you, my liege .
textByHashes.c47511d2ef09344d6f09ac931e5c89daa3b1560d: I seek a moment of your time, sirrah!
textByHashes.6babfdb5552cf8000a83cafc7fd356d1a57486d2: I seek a moment of your time, ma'am!
textByHashes.d5eaa4a4aa0ea46222f027d3c4dfac25e38c3902: I seek a moment of your time, my liege!
textByHashes.7eb2f91d5234924f79fb4bb5b5777e54b6e194cc: My liege , please speak to me!
